title: Bricks and Bits
description: Transform your Minecraft World with vibrant cartoony textures
body:
Bricks and Bits is a resource pack that completely transforms your Minecraft world, featuring colorful vibrant textures and stylized mobs that will fully immerse players in a new Minecraft art style.

Please note, this is a Early Release of the resource pack and is considered unfinished! Expect certain aspects of the game to look unpolished, contain potential visual bugs, and unfinished in some or most areas of the game! With each update, we hope to get closer and closer to a proper release of the pack!

This resource pack is being developed by Bricks and Bits, a small Minecraft studio that publishes Minecraft-related content that strives to enhance the player experience by offering new ways to play the game. Please show support and join our Discord Server!
